SPAM DEATHMATCH WHEN NOT IN RANKED
SPEND MORE TIME FOCUSING ON YOUR SURROUNDINGS, STOP TUNNEL VISIONING INDIVIDUAL HEROES.
AVOID CONCENTRATING ON NON-IMPORTANT ASPECTS OF THE GAME - TEAM PICKS / DRAMA / CHATTER, GRIEVING.
DURING DEATHTIME CONCENTRATE STRICTLY ON EXACTLY WHY I DIED AND HOW IT COULD HAVE BEEN AVOIDED
FOCUS ON STAYING POSITIVE 100% OF THE TIME
MUTE TOXIC TEAM MATES WITHOUT RESPONDING
ACCEPT THE FACT IT'S OK TO LOSE MORE THAN YOU WIN OCCASIONALLY
NEVER FOCUS ON A TEAM MATES' MISTAKES. IF THERE'S SOMETHING CONSTRUCTIVE (NOT CONDESCENDING) TO POINT OUT, DO IT SO IN A FRIENDLY WAY.
TRY TO HAVE MORE FUN WITH THE GAME IN GENERAL, BE ACTIVE IN CHAT IN A FUN WAY, NOT A NEGATIVE.
FOCUS ON MELEE COMBO ON EVERY JUMP, EXCEPT FOR CERTAIN SITUATIONS - LANDING ON A GRAV, MULTIPLE TARGETS IN GENERAL
CONTINUE FOCUSSING ON BUBBLE TIMING FOR FLASHBANG, SLEEP DART AND CHAIN HOOK
IMPROVE TRACKING ON VERTICAL TARGETS, MAINLY GENJI'S FLYING AROUND
LET YOUR REINHARDT MAKE A PLAY BEFORE NANOBOOSTING HIM SO HE DOESN'T GET COUNTERED IMMEDIATELY
DON'T TUNNEL VISION ON SOULS WAITING FOR YOUR REZ TO GET UP. YOU'LL GET KILLED.
DON'T REZ JUST BECAUSE YOU CAN
A DISCORD A DAY KEEPS THE FLANKERS AWAY
ANA MAINS DON'T LIKE TO PLAY MERCY. REALLY.
ANA'S SLEEP LASTS 5.5 SECONDS. USE IT WISELY.
ANA'S NADE WILL FUCK YOUR ULT. BE AWARE OF THAT.
IF YOU HAVE A SUPPORT THAT IS STRUGGLING WITH A FLANKER, TRY AND STAY NEAR HIM.
YOU DON'T NEED TO STOP FIRING TO THROW AN ORB. IF YOU'RE HOLDING RIGHT/LEFT CLICK AND TAP E YOU'LL THROW A DAMAGE/HEALING ORB AND THEN CONTINUE FIRING.
HER HEALING BEAM APPLIES A HEAL-OVER-TIME THAT PERSISTS FOR ABOUT 4 SECONDS AFTER SHE STOPS DIRECTLY HEALING (16.25 HPS). TAP HEAL A LOT TO SAVE THE HEAL METER.

TURRETS ONLY HAVE 1 HP AND DON'T DO MUCH DAMAGE INDIVIDUALLY. TRY NOT TO PLACE THEM IN OBVIOUS SPOTS. PUT THEM SOMEWHERE WHERE THEY WILL SHOOT THE ENEMY IN THE BACK JUST AS THEY ENGAGE WITH YOUR TEAM, FORCING THEM TO FOCUS ON THREATS FROM THE FRONT AND THE BACK SIMULTANEOUSLY
SHE WORKS BEST IF YOU PLAY HER LIKE YOU WOULD REAPER. TRY TO FLANK BEHIND THE ENEMY TEAM AND DON'T LET THEM KNOW YOU'RE THERE FOR AS LONG AS POSSIBLE
ALWAYS GO FOR THE SQUISHIER TARGETS FIRST; SUPPORTS ARE IDEAL, BUT BE WARY OF STUN ABILITIES. GO FROM THE WEAKEST HEROES WITH THE LEAST HP TO THE MOST; SAVE THE TANKS FOR THE VERY LAST
DON'T ALWAYS LOOK FOR ENEMIES TO KILL BUT RATHER LOOK FOR TEAMMATES TO HELP.
PLEASE, DON'T REPORT FUEY.
HANZO'S ARROWS CAN GET STUCK IN YOUR SHIELD AND DAMAGE OR KILL (!) YOUR TEAMMATES. BE AWARE OF THAT.
GOLD MEDALS OFTEN MEAN NOTHING.
GROUP UP. NO, YOU CANNOT DIVE INTO THE ENEMY TEAM 1V6 AND EXPECT HEALING.
MUTE TOXIC PLAYERS. YOU WON'T CHANGE THEIR WAYS, AND THEIR ONLY GOAL IS TO MAKE YOUR GAME LESS ENJOYABLE. F*CK THEM.
AIM TO THE NECK.
ALT + Z WILL TOGGLE THE UI (USER INTERFACE). CAREFUL WITH THAT.
CTRL + SHIFT + N WILL SHOW YOU THE NETGRAPH, WHICH IS INTENDED FOR TROUBLESHOOTING NETWORK PROBLEMS.
YOU CAN BLOCK DOOMFIST'S ULT BY PLACING A WALL 50% FROM THE CENTER.
USE YOUR TELEPORTER AS A DECOY.
THE CONCUSION MINE WILL *ALWAYS* LAUNCH YOU UPWARDS
IF YOU'RE TRYING TO DIVE THE ENEMY TEAM ALONE, TRY TO SAVE YOUR JUMP PACK AS A METHOD OF ESCAPE INSTEAD OF ENGAGEMENT.
TALK TO YOUR TEAM ABOUT WHICH ULTS TO COMBO TOGETHER TO USE AS LITTLE AS POSSIBLE TO WIN A TEAMFIGHT.
ASK YOURSELF: WHERE IS EVERYONE? WHERE IS MY TEAM? WHERE IS THEIR TEAM? WHAT POINT ARE WE PLAYING ON?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT HERO AM I PLAYING? IS IT CLOSE, MEDIUM, OR LONG RANGE? HOW MUCH HEALTH DO I HAVE? WHAT ABILITIES DO I HAVE FOR MOBILITY AND SURVIVABILITY?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT IS MY TEAM COMPOSITION? DOES IT HAVE BARRIERS I CAN HIDE BEHIND? IS THERE A LOT OF HEALING? IS THERE A LONG RANGE HEALER, OR DO I HAVE TO BE NEAR THEM FOR HEALING?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT IS THE ENEMY TEAM COMPOSITION? DO THEY HAVE A SNIPER? DO THEY HAVE FLANKERS? ARE THEY ABLE TO EASILY GET TO WHEREVER I AM WITH MOBILITY ABILITIES?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT ABILITIES ARE AVAILABLE TO THE ENEMY? DOES ZARYA HAVE GRAVITON SURGE READY? IS GENJI CLOSE TO DRAGON BLADE? HAS MCCREE USED HIS FLASHBANG?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT DOES THE MAP LOOK LIKE? IS IT WIDE OPEN? ARE THERE PLACES THAT I CAN EASILY USE FOR COVER? IS THERE HIGH GROUND? WHAT ARE THE LIKELY PLACES THE ENEMY TEAM IS COMING FROM?
IF AN ENEMY HAS ARMOR, EVERY HIT THAT DOES <10 DMG IS HALVED, AND THOSE THAT DO >10 ARE REDUCED BY 5 -> ARMOR IS WEAK AGAINST BURST DAMAGE, BUT STRONG AGAINST LOW DMG RAPID FIRE WEAPONS.
IF AN ENEMY HAS ARMOUR, TRY HITTING WITH HELIX ROCKET FIRST, BURSTING DOWN MOST OF THEIR ARMOR BEFORE USING YOUR PRIMARY FIRE TO WHITTLE DOWN THE REST OF THEIR HEALTH.
WHEN STARTING YOUR ULT, IT RECHARGES YOUR CLIP AND YOU CAN PUT UP A HEAL WITHOUT LOSING TIME.
TRY TO THINK SMART WHEN TO USE HER OR NOT. MAPS WITH LOTS OF HIGH GROUND ARE NOT IDEAL FOR HER.
HACKING A REIN ESPECIALLY AT THE BEGINNING OF A GAME WILL ALMOST ALWAYS WIN YOU THE TEAMFIGHT.
EMP IS AN ENGAGER AND SHOULD NOT BE USED AS AN ANSWER MOST OF THE TIME.
HIS RIGHT CLICK IS INSANE AGAINST TANKS IN CLOSE RANGE.
YOU CANNOT WIN FULL HEALTH WINSTON IN 1-ON-1 ENCOUNTER EVEN IF YOUR BEAM IS FULLY CHARGED.
IF YOU'RE PLAYING WINSTON AND YOU GET NANOED, DON'T ULT. YOUR DPS IS ACTUALLY BETTER IN YOUR NORMAL FORM.
BUBBLING A REINHARDT WHILE HIS SHIELD IS UP WORKS.
WHEN YOU'RE AGAINST A GENJI, REMEMBER TO THROW THE FLASHBANG ABOVE HIS DEFLECT'S HITBOX.
THE PAYLOAD HEALS AT A RATE OF 10 HPS.
YOU CAN HEAL BY ATTACKING MEI WALLS.
HANZO'S SONIC ARROW CAN STILL KILL IF STUCK ON A SHIELD.
WANNA GIVE WINSTON OR MOIRA THE FINGER? JUST ADD ARMOR!

REPRESENTED ON THE HEALTH BAR BY YELLOW (INNATE ARMOR) OR ORANGE (TEMP ARMOR) INCREMENTS, ARMOR WILL BLOCK 5 HP DAMAGE FROM EVERY INDIVIDUAL HIT THAT DEALS >10 HP DAMAGE. HITS THAT DEAL <10 HP DAMAGE WILL BE HALVED.

YOU DON'T ACTUALLY GET INTO A MATCH FASTER WHEN SKIPPING THE END OF ROUND FLOW (VICTORY POSES, POTG, CARDS, STATS ETC.). YOU DON'T GET ENTERED INTO THE MATCHMAKING QUEUE UNTIL YOUR PREVIOUS MATCH RESOLVES COMPLETELY
IF YOU SHOOT A HELIX AT DVA AS HER MECH IS FLASHING RED RIGHT BEFORE SHE HOPS OUT, IT WILL TAKE HALF HER HEALTH.
DO NOT FORTIFY DURING WHOLE HOG. THE KNOCKBACK PROTECTS YOU FROM TAKING FULL DAMAGE. HOG WILL ABSOLUTELY MELT YOU IF YOU FORTIFY.
GET WITHIN JUMP RANGE OF A SQUISHY TARGET WITHOUT USING YOUR JUMP OR YOUR BUBBLE. WAIT FOR COOLDOWNS THEN JUMP THE TARGET WITH JUMP+MELEE.
YOUR HEALING ORB IS A LOT MORE EFFECTIVE ON A HERO LIKE GENJI THAN ON A TANK.
TEAM MORALE IS THE MOST IMPORTANT THING
YOU CAN ALSO CALL HER: BRUSCHETTA, BROCCOLLY, BREADSTICK, BAGGETTE.
HER RIFLE HEALS 75 HP, WHILE DEALS 70 DMG. HER NADE, 100 HP / 60 DMG. HER SLEEP, 5 DMG. HER ULT AMPLIFIES DMG DEALT BY 50%
WHEN USING HER FLAIL, IT HEALS 16 HP/S FOR 5 SEC, THE MELEE DOES 35 DMG AND WHIPSHOT, 70 DMG. THE REPAIR PACK HEALS 150 HP AND UP TO 75 TEMPORARY ARMOR. HER ULT GETS UP-TO 150 PERMA ARMOR.
HIS NORMAL AURA HEALS 16.25 HP/S, WHEN AMPED IT BRINGS IT UP TO 46.8 HP/S FOR THREE SECS. THE SOUNDBARRIER PROVIDES 500 TEMP SHIELD.
THE STAFF CAN HEAL 50 HP/S OR AMPLIFY 30% DMG DEALT. HER GUN DOES 20 DPS, WHILE MELEE 35 DMG.

THE BIOTIC GRASP HEALS 80 HP/S (AND LEAVES A RESIDUE OF 16.66 HP/S FOR 3 SECS) WHILE IT DEALS 50 DPS. THE ORB HEALS 75 HP/S (UP TO 300 HP) AND DEALS 50 DPS (UP TO 200 DMG). HER ULT HEALS 140 HP/S AND DEALS 70 DPS.
HER BEAMS DEALS BETWEEN 26 AND 125 DPS. THE SHIELD GEN GRANTS 75 PERMA SHIELDS.

THE ORB DEALS 46 DMG, WHILE THE VOLLEY CAN GET UP-TO 230 DMG (460 DMG IF HEADSHOT). THE ORB OF HARMONY HEALS 30 HP/S WHILE THE DISCORD AMPLIFIES DMG RECEIVED BY 30%. TRANSCENDENCE HEALS 300 HP/S FOR 6 SECS.

PLEASE DON'T SAY 'WE NEED MORE DAMAGE' OR 'WE'RE NOT GETTING ENOUGH DAMAGE'. EVEN IF YOUR TEAM IS OBVIOUSLY THE PROBLEM, WHEN STARTING THE SWITCH CONVERSATION, ALWAYS BLAME THE ENEMY TEAM'S STRONG PLAY, NOT YOUR TEAM'S SHITTY PLAY
A LOT OF DIAMOND PLAYERS GET MAD AT THEIR TEAMMATES FOR DYING, INSTEAD OF THINKING IF THEY COULD HAVE SAVED THEM
CANCEL DEFLECT WITH DASH OR WALLCLIMB
FORTIFY'S DAMAGE REDUCTION STACKS WITH ARMOR, SO DON'T JUST SAVE IT FOR WHEN YOU HAVE LOW HP!

SOMETIMES YOU WANT TO ASK A QUESTION THAT MIGHT BE PERCEIVED AS RUDE. (EX. GENJI WHERE WERE YOU?) LET YOUR TEAMMATE KNOW THAT YOU'RE JUST ASKING SO YOU KNOW HOW TO WORK WITH THEM BETTER AND NOT TO INSULT THEM.
YOU CAN ROCKET/CANNON JUMP TO THE TIRES OVER POINT 1 ON LUNAR COLONY.
